column1: # Custom partition table for a 4MB ESP32 (0x400000 total).
# Two OTA app slots of 1.375MB each (enough for TLS + async web server)
# plus a ~1.2MB filesystem partition to hold the gzipped web UI.
# NOTE: the subtype is 'spiffs' even though we format it as LittleFS.
# The ESP-IDF partition tool has no 'littlefs' subtype keyword; Arduino's
# LittleFS.begin() mounts the partition labeled "spiffs" by default.
